---
title: "Subsystems"
subtitle: "Module 6 — BCSE205L"
author: "Justus Raju"
date: last-modified
---

## Outline

::: {.incremental}
- External storage systems: solid state drives
- Organization and structure of disk drives
- Electronic, magnetic, and optical technologies
- Reliability of memory systems
- Error detecting and error correcting systems
- Hamming code
- RAID levels
- I/O performance
:::

::: {.notes}
This module covers external storage systems, disk drive organization, error detection and correction mechanisms including Hamming codes, RAID configurations, and I/O performance evaluation.
:::
